enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a 7,520-meter swim session (short of his 10K goal) on May 9, 2019, attributing underperformance to a hangover and depression over car trouble. He discusses his fitness comeback routine, malfunctioning pool earphones, plans for a mountain run the next day, and what he's been listening to/reading while training.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Prefers overtraining over careful recovery, especially early in a fitness comeback
Prefers mountain running over treadmill because hills naturally slow pace and reduce pressure
Not doing them yet — currently too out of shape, but expects to add them as fitness improves
Frustrated that no reliable waterproof earphone solution exists; considers it a real problem for endurance swimmers
Prefers music or books during swimming but finds them useless when audio quality is poor
Finds it extremely boring and too long but wants to finish it before moving on to philosophy
